query:
SELECT 
  c.id AS claim_id,
  c.description,
  c.incident_type,
  c.reported_cause_label,
  c.vehicle_make,
  c.vehicle_model,
  c.vehicle_year,
  c.vehicle_body_type,
  c.vehicle_color,
  c.vehicle_vin,
  c.key_facts_json,
  a.id AS assessment_id,
  a.estimated_cost,
  a.confidence_score,
  a.fraud_risk_level,
  a.fraud_risk_score,
  a.damage_severity,
  a.damage_zones_json,
  a.damaged_parts_json,
  a.physics_analysis_json,
  a.cost_analysis_json,
  a.fraud_analysis_json,
  a.causal_verdict_json,
  a.narrative_json,
  a.stage_outputs_json,
  a.consensus_result_json,
  a.evidence_bundle_json,
  a.realism_bundle_json,
  a.benchmark_bundle_json,
  a.constraint_overrides_json,
  a.created_at
FROM claims c
LEFT JOIN ai_assessments a ON a.claim_id = c.id
WHERE c.description ILIKE '%mandava%' 
   OR c.description ILIKE '%high school%'
   OR c.id IN (
     SELECT claim_id FROM ai_assessments 
     WHERE narrative_json::text ILIKE '%mandava%'
        OR narrative_json::text ILIKE '%high school%'
   )
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
LIMIT 5;
